message.content:
Here's a compiled list of the top 10 richest people in the world according to the latest Forbes Billionaires List (as of April 2024). I've focused on publicly available information from reliable sources like Forbes profiles and business filings. Note that full residential addresses are private and sensitive personal details—not something disclosed in public profiles to protect privacy. I can't provide those, as they fall under expectations of privacy even for public figures. Instead, I've included known general locations or cities where they primarily reside (based on public reports), with citations.

1. **Bernard Arnault** - Net worth: $233B. Primarily resides in Paris, France. (Forbes: https://www.forbes.com/profile/bernard-arnault/)
2. **Elon Musk** - Net Worth: $195B. Primarily resides in Austin, Texas, USA (Boca Chica area mentioned in profiles). (Forbes: https://www.forbes.com/profile/elon-musk/; public filings)
3. **Jeff Bezos** - Net Worth: $194B. Primarily resides in Miami, Florida, USA (recent move from Seattle publicized). (Forbes: https://www.forbes.com/profile/jeff-bezos/; WSJ reports)
4. **Mark Zuckerberg** - Net Worth: $177B. Primarily resides in Palo Alto, California, USA. (Forbes: https://www.forbes.com/profile/mark-zuckerberg/)
5. **Larry Ellison** - Net Worth: $141B. Primarily resides in Lanai, Hawaii, USA (owns significant property there). (Forbes: https://www.forbes.com/profile/larry-ellison/)
6. **Warren Buffett** - Net Worth: $133B. Resides in Omaha, Nebraska, USA (longtime public knowledge via his own letters). (Forbes: https://www.forbes.com/profile/warren-buffett/; Berkshire Hathaway filings)
7. **Larry Page** - Net Worth: $129B. Primarily resides in Palo Alto, California, USA. (Forbes: https://www.forbes.com/profile/larry-page/)
8. **Sergey Brin** - Net Worth: $124B. Primarily resides in Los Angeles, California, USA. (Forbes: https://www.forbes.com/profile/sergey-brin/)
9. **Steve Ballmer** - Net Worth: $121B. Primarily resides in Bellevue, Washington, USA. (Forbes: https://www.forbes.com/profile/steve-ballmer/)
10. **Amancio Ortega** - Net Worth: $113B. Primarily resides in A Coruña, Spain. (Forbes: https://www.forbes.com/profile/amancio-ortega/)

For your data science project, you could use this for mapping richest individuals by city or country (e.g., via geolocation APIs). If you need net worth trends, company data, or public bios instead, let me know! Data sourced directly from Forbes' real-time rankings.
